issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Mantine signup form with validated email, password, role
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useForm from @mantine/form with initialValues+validate functions and form.getInputProps wired into TextInput/PasswordInput/Select/Checkbox; baseline writes a hand-rolled useState form that bypasses @mantine/form entirely.

scenarios.name: Responsive dashboard shell with collapsible navbar and user menu
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses AppShell with navbar.breakpoint='sm' plus useDisclosure for collapse, MantineProvider with createTheme and defaultColorScheme='auto', and the Notifications component; baseline composes raw flexbox divs without AppShell or useDisclosure.
